aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Sharp but reactive

💼 Career: Tum quick action loge, par kisi aur ki pace se clash ho sakta hai

❤️ Love: Jaldi conclusion pe mat jao

💰 Money: Risky move avoid karo

🧘 Advice: Pause before reacting

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum patience lose karte ho jab control nahi milta
taurus:
♉ Taurus

💼 Career: Tumhara consistent effort aaj noticeable hoga

❤️ Love: Secure aur grounded feel hoga

💰 Money: Steady growth ka signal

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum slow ho, par tumhara impact long-term hota hai

♊ Gemini
